remarks: Welcome to the 1st floor 1-bedroom condo in the desirable Woodside Green community. This unit features hardwood floors, a spacious living area, a generously sized bedroom, and plenty of natural light. Enjoy the convenience of first-floor living in a beautifully landscaped community with ample parking, just minutes from downtown Stamford, Scalzi Park, Metro-North, shopping, restaurants, I-95, and the Merritt Parkway. No weekend move. The rent includes water and cooking gas. Must have good credit score.
